sections.question_synthetic: A Mendocino County Board member seeks guidance on whether he has a conflict of interest regarding proposed timber harvest rules that may affect his mother's property (of which he is an heir) and whether he should disclose this interest on his conflict statement.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC response. The sender (Eddie) is requesting a legal opinion from FPPC, not providing one. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections are present; the letter is narrative in form. The sender describes his family interest in properties that would be affected by proposed Mendocino County timber rules and asks for guidance on conflict of interest disclosure obligations.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: A Mendocino County Board member seeks guidance on whether he has a conflict of interest regarding proposed timber harvest rules that may affect his mother's property (of which he is an heir) and whether he should disclose this interest on his conflict statement.

embedding.summary: An incoming request letter from a Mendocino County Board member (Eddie) requesting a written legal opinion on whether he has a conflict of interest regarding proposed forestry rules affecting his mother's timber properties and whether he should acknowledge this interest on his conflict statement.
